name: MONDOR DISEASE
definition: rare usually self-limited thrombophlebitis of subcutaneous veins (mostly thoracoepigastric v.)
dominant_finding: superficial hypoechoic tubular structure containing low-level internal echoes (= thrombus)
discriminating_features: linear ropelike tubular superficial structure ± beading
superficial hypoechoic tubular structure containing low-level internal echoes (= thrombus)

general: linear ropelike tubular superficial structure ± beading
US: superficial hypoechoic tubular structure containing low-level internal echoes (= thrombus)
